creator: raimeetravel
caption:
Stop dreaming about trips and actually start taking them ✈️ #PayPalPartner

Bucket list trips can feel complicated and expensive, which is why they often stay “someday” plans.

I used @mindtrip.ai to map everything out in one place, then paid with PayPal Pay Later to split the cost into smaller payments.

Save the offer before you check out on a $250+ flight purchase and you can earn 5,000 PayPal rewards points.

If you’ve been thinking about a trip… this is your sign <3

transcription.text: i just booked my trip to paris without the planning stress and i've partnered with paypal to show you exactly how. so instead of having 47 tabs open, i used mindtrip, an ai-powered travel platform. i told mindtrip that i had about 10 days, wanted to avoid peak season crowds, and needed to be back before my best friend's wedding. it came back with the best window to fly and flights that actually worked. and then here's the part that actually changed how i think about booking trips. instead of paying for everything up front, paypal lets you split the cost into flexible payments. and right now you can earn 5,000 paypal rewards points if you save this offer and make at least a $250 pay later purchase on mindtrip. those points spend like $50 at paypal checkout. i booked my flights and i'll figure the rest out later. save the offer at the link in my bio. your summer trip is calling.
